Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2>Leter du etter noe spesielt?</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h4</p> <div class="element"><h4>Min Side er en selvbetjeningsløsning der du får oversikt over dine abonnementer, forbruk, fakturaer og mye mer.</h4></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h2 to h5</p> <div class="element"><h5>Elsikkerhet i desember</h5></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)</p> <div class="element"><main></div> <div class="fix">Use only one <main> element per page</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Use h2 instead of h4</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h2 to h5</p> <div class="element"><h5>Elsikkerhet i desember</h5></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>SVG is missing accessible name</p> <div class="element"><svg height="21" viewbox="0 0 24 21" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <g fill="none" fill-rule="evenodd" stroke="#168183" stroke-width="2" transform="translate(.5 .5)"><circle cx="8" cy=</div> <div class="fix">Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2>Leter du etter noe spesielt?</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)</p> <div class="element"><main></div> <div class="fix">Use only one <main> element per page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (94 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2>Leter du etter noe spesielt?</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h4</p> <div class="element"><h4>Her får du noen tips i fra oss om hvordan du kan holde ditt hjem elsikkert!</h4></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h2 to h5</p> <div class="element"><h5>Elsikkerhet i desember</h5></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)</p> <div class="element"><main></div> <div class="fix">Use only one <main> element per page</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="site-nav js-open-nav-item" style="top: 109px;"> <div class="inner-nav"> <div class="search-bar-wrapper"> <form action="https://www.lucerna.no/søk"> <label aria-label="Søk Lucerna"> <input </div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h4><br/></h4></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (102 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Use h2 instead of h4</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h2 to h5</p> <div class="element"><h5>Elsikkerhet i desember</h5></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="site-nav js-open-nav-item" style="top: 109px;"> <div class="inner-nav"> <div class="search-bar-wrapper"> <form action="https://www.lucerna.no/søk"> <label aria-label="Søk Lucerna"> <input </div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (126 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Personal data field 'person-address' missing autocomplete attribute</p> <div class="element"><input id="person-address" name="person-address" type="text"/></div> <div class="fix">Add autocomplete='street-address' to help users fill in the form</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>iframe is missing title attribute</p> <div class="element"><iframe style="display: none;"></iframe></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive title attribute to iframe</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Aktuelt | Lucerna</h3> <div class="page-url">https://www.lucerna.no/aktuelt</div> <div>Avvik: 114 | Bestått: 87</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2>Leter du etter noe spesielt?</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Personal data field 'person-address' missing autocomplete attribute</p> <div class="element"><input id="person-address" name="person-address" type="text"/></div> <div class="fix">Add autocomplete='street-address' to help users fill in the form</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>iframe is missing title attribute</p> <div class="element"><iframe style="display: none;"></iframe></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive title attribute to iframe</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="page"> <div class="page-header"> <h3>Priser fra 1. januar 2025 | Lucerna</h3> <div class="page-url">https://www.lucerna.no/priser_2025</div> <div>Avvik: 140 | Bestått: 64</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (9 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2>Leter du etter noe spesielt?</h2></div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3>Priser</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h2 to h5</p> <div class="element"><h5>Elsikkerhet i desember</h5></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)</p> <div class="element"><main></div> <div class="fix">Use only one <main> element per page</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="site-nav js-open-nav-item" style="top: 109px;"> <div class="inner-nav"> <div class="search-bar-wrapper"> <form action="https://www.lucerna.no/søk"> <label aria-label="Søk Lucerna"> <input </div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (6 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'search-input-main' appears 2 times</p> <div class="element">id="search-input-main"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details> </div> </div> <div class="footer"> <p>Testreglene er basert på <a href="https://www.uutilsynet.no/regelverk/oversikt-over-testregler-nettsteder/709" target="_blank">UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler</a></p> </div> <div class="modal-overlay" id="rescanModal"> <div class="modal"> <h3>🔄 Start ny skanning</h3> <div class="modal-url">https://lucerna.no</div> <div class="modal-pages"> <label>Antall sider:</label> <input type="number" id="maxPages" value="21" min="1" max="500" onchange="updateCommand()"> <span class="modal-pages-hint">1-500</span> </div> <p style="font-size:13px;color:#666;margin:0 0 8px">Kopier kommandoen:</p> <div class="modal-command" id="rescanCommand">python checker.py https://lucerna.no --max-pages 21 --format html</div> <div class="modal-actions"> <button class="modal-btn secondary" onclick="closeRescanModal()">Lukk</button> <button class="modal-btn primary" onclick="copyCommand()">📋 Kopier</button> </div> </div> </div> </body> </html>
